name: islm i+1 story dataset v2 (teacher-regen; en exam + zh/ja authored graded)
provenance: en: islm.datagen.teacher --targets exam + humanizer + 2nd-pass validate. zh/ja: hand-authored coherent i+1 stories, validated through scripts/author_cjk.py (compact-known scoping + deterministic hard-pass: coverage/OOV, <=1-new-word/sentence, recurrence>=3x). No LLM API used for zh/ja.
schema: chat records system+user+assistant; metadata has hard_pass, target_recurrence, source
